meta.description: Curated KeyQL scenario templates using synthetic identities only. Clicking a scenario replaces the current query — names, domains, and projects are fictitious.

scenarios.title: Emails from a user within a date range
scenarios.summary: All mail sent by one user between two dates.
scenarios.query: kind:email AND from:"pilarp@contoso.com" AND sent>=2025-01-01 AND sent<=2025-03-31

scenarios.title: Emails between two specific users
scenarios.summary: Either direction between User A and User B.
scenarios.query: kind:email AND ((from:pilarp@contoso.com AND to:garthf@contoso.com) OR (from:garthf@contoso.com AND to:pilarp@contoso.com))

scenarios.title: Mentions of a project across mail and documents
scenarios.summary: Free-text keyword hits anywhere, both mail and files.

scenarios.title: Documents by a specific author and file type
scenarios.summary: Narrow to docx/xlsx/pptx owned by one person.
scenarios.query: kind:docs AND author:"Ann Beebe" AND (filetype:docx OR filetype:xlsx OR filetype:pptx)

scenarios.title: Teams chats involving a specific participant
scenarios.summary: Pulls Teams chats / meetings / calls where a user is involved.

scenarios.title: High-importance mail sent last month
scenarios.summary: Uses the 'last month' relative interval keyword.
scenarios.query: kind:email AND importance:high AND sent:"last month"

scenarios.title: Emails to a user excluding automated senders
scenarios.summary: Demonstrates explicit AND NOT (space = OR in eDiscovery).
scenarios.query: kind:email AND to:pilarp@contoso.com AND NOT from:noreply@example.com

scenarios.title: Correspondence with an external domain
scenarios.summary: Participants on a domain other than contoso.com.

scenarios.title: Files last modified in a specific window

subjects: Re: Q1 Financials — draft for review
